title: calamari
description: A small mod that adds edible squid drop items.
body:
# Calamari
*A small mod that adds edible squid drop items.*

[**Modrinth**](https://modrinth.com/mod/calamari) | [**Github**](https://github.com/woodalis/calamari)

![Dead squid dropping various loot, including fillets](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/35je2jPZ/images/3124184f8f8c0b6f3cd98948d0bfa6d5a57af377.png)

When killed, **squids** and **glow squids** drop 0 to 2 raw fillets and 0 to 4 raw tentacles.
Both of these [can be cooked](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/35je2jPZ/images/85b8c46a33c63536b779e382ecb17b0a580088be.png), into calamari and crispy tentacles respectively.

 - A **Raw Squid Fillet** restores 2 hunger and has a nourishment value of 0.2
 - **Calamari** restores 5 hunger and has a nourishment value of 1.2
 - A **Raw Squid Tentacle** restores 1 hunger and has a nourishment value of 0.2
 - A **Crispy Squid Tentacle** restores 3 hunger and has a nourishment value of 1.2

![Squid cooking on a campfire](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/35je2jPZ/images/dad64902ae83cdd877410063d68bfa5d95db3088.png)
